item.description: The FBI has arrested 19-year-old Tycen Proper in Ohio for an alleged plot to attack the UFC event hosted at the White House. NBC News' Tom Winter reports on the concerns Proper's mother called into police and the charges he is facing.

media:content.media:title: Suspect's mother called police about UFC attack plot concerns
media:content.media:description: The FBI has arrested 19-year-old Tycen Proper in Ohio for an alleged plot to attack the UFC event hosted at the White House. NBC News' Tom Winter reports on the concerns Proper's mother called into police and the charges he is facing.

item.title: Suspect's mother called police about UFC attack plot concerns

item.dc:creator: Rohan Nadkarni
item.description: When Argentina plays Algeria on Tuesday and Portugal takes on Congo on Wednesday, two of soccer’s most storied players will begin what will likely be their last runs at the World Cup

media:content.media:text: Composite image of Cristiano Ronaldo and Lionel Messi
media:content.media:description: Cristiano Ronaldo of Portugal, left; Lionel Messi of Argentina, right.

item.title: Ronaldo and Messi kick off their World Cups with one last match potentially on the line

item.dc:creator: Saba Hamedy
item.description: Iran national team fans watched the 2-2- draw with New Zealand at the World Cup in Los Angeles, many holding the lion and sun flag in protest at the Islamic Republic.

media:content.media:text: Spectators react at the Iran vs. New Zealand World Cup game watch party at Meymuni Cafe in Los Angeles on June 15, 2026.
media:content.media:description: Iranian fans gathered at watch parties around the country, including one at Meymuni Cafe in Los Angeles on Monday.

media:content.media:credit: Ty ONeil / AP; Stu Forster / Getty Images
media:content.media:text: Above: Pre-revolutionary flags waved in Los Angeles on Monday. Below: Action from Iran vs New Zealand, which was tied 2-2.
media:content.media:description: Iranian fans gathered at watch parties around the country, including one at Meymuni Cafe in Los Angeles on Monday.

media:content.media:text: Left: Sima Vaziri reacts to the game at Meymuni Cafe in Los Angeles on Monday.
media:content.media:description: Iranian fans gathered at watch parties around the country, including one at Meymuni Cafe in Los Angeles on Monday.

media:content.media:text: World Cup fever comes at a difficult time for Iranians both inside and outside the country
media:content.media:description: Iranian fans gathered at watch parties around the country, including one at Meymuni Cafe in Los Angeles on Monday.

media:content.media:text: Iranian fans draped in national colors at Meymuni Cafe in Los Angeles on Monday.
media:content.media:description: Iranian fans gathered at watch parties around the country, including one at Meymuni Cafe in Los Angeles on Monday.

item.title: Pride and protest in ‘Tehrangeles’: A divided diaspora watches Iran at the World Cup

item.dc:creator: David Hickey
item.description: The last time four World Cup matches on the same day ended in a tie, Pelé was the 17-year-old breakout star and Frenchman Just Fontaine went on to score a tournament-record 13 goals.

media:content.media:text: IR Iran v New Zealand: Group G - FIFA World Cup 2026
media:content.media:description: Chris Wood of New Zealand controls the ball against Shoja Khalilzadeh of Iran during a World Cup Group G match on Monday.

media:content.media:text: Vozinha of Cape Verde makes a save against Spain on June 15, 2026 in Atlanta.
media:content.media:description: Chris Wood of New Zealand controls the ball against Shoja Khalilzadeh of Iran during a World Cup Group G match on Monday.

media:content.media:text: Team France players practice on the soccer field, Mbappe is center
media:content.media:description: Chris Wood of New Zealand controls the ball against Shoja Khalilzadeh of Iran during a World Cup Group G match on Monday.

item.title: From The Sports Desk: Four World Cup games, four tightly contested draws on Monday

item.dc:creator: Doha Madani
item.description: It might be the smallest U.S. city to host the FIFA World Cup this summer, but Kansas City organizers are hoping to be considered the mightiest by fans who will be arriving in the Midwest to celebrate the biggest single-sport tournament in the world.

media:content.media:text: A general view of Arrowhead Stadium
media:content.media:description: A general view of Arrowhead Stadium ahead of the 2026 World Cup at Kansas City Stadium on May 11, 2026 in Kansas City, Missouri.

media:content.media:text: A FIFA World Cup ball on the pitch at Arrowhead Stadium on May 11, 2026 in Kansas City, Mo.
media:content.media:description: A FIFA World Cup ball on the pitch at Arrowhead Stadium on Monday.

item.title: Kansas City is using ‘Midwestern pioneering spirit’ to host the World Cup

item.description: El ganador del Balón de Oro, Ousmane Dembelé, está mano a mano en el show, y asegura que la Selección de Francia cuenta con la máxima exigencia de ganar el título en la Copa Mundial de la FIFA 2026.

media:content.media:title: Ousmane Dembélé: “Tenemos siempre el objetivo de ganar el título” | Vive el Mundial
media:content.media:description: El ganador del Balón de Oro, Ousmane Dembelé, está mano a mano en el show, y asegura que la Selección de Francia cuenta con la máxima exigencia de ganar el título en la Copa Mundial de la FIFA 2026.

item.title: Ousmane Dembélé: “Tenemos siempre el objetivo de ganar el título” | Vive el Mundial

item.description: Francia y Senegal listos para el inicio mundialista // D: Los franceses y senegales ya están arribando a East Rutherford para iniciar su aventura mundialista; Francia busca mostrar al mundo que son serios candidatos al título.

media:content.media:title: ¡A punto de comenzar! Francia y Senegal están llegando a East Rutherford para su debut en el Mundial
media:content.media:description: Francia y Senegal listos para el inicio mundialista // D: Los franceses y senegales ya están arribando a East Rutherford para iniciar su aventura mundialista; Francia busca mostrar al mundo que son serios candidatos al título.

item.title: ¡A punto de comenzar! Francia y Senegal están llegando a East Rutherford para su debut en el Mundial

item.description: A través de la construcción de mini canchas y programas comunitarios, Tyler Adams busca que más niños tengan acceso al fútbol. Descubre la causa que impulsa al capitán de Estados Unidos en Mi Mundialista Favorito.

media:content.media:title: Tyler Adams quiere abrirle las puertas del fútbol a la próxima generación
media:content.media:description: A través de la construcción de mini canchas y programas comunitarios, Tyler Adams busca que más niños tengan acceso al fútbol. Descubre la causa que impulsa al capitán de Estados Unidos en Mi Mundialista Favorito.

item.title: Tyler Adams quiere abrirle las puertas del fútbol a la próxima generación

item.description: Conoce Café Corazón, el restaurante argentino que enloquece a toda la ciudad. Un lugar que reúne no solo a toda la hinchada argentina que está lista para recibir a su selección, sino también a un montón de curiosos locales enamorados de su ambiente.

media:content.media:title: El rinconcito más argentino de toda Kansas City: un paraíso de choripán y cumbia
media:content.media:description: Conoce Café Corazón, el restaurante argentino que enloquece a toda la ciudad. Un lugar que reúne no solo a toda la hinchada argentina que está lista para recibir a su selección, sino también a un montón de curiosos locales enamorados de su ambiente.

item.title: El rinconcito más argentino de toda Kansas City: un paraíso de choripán y cumbia

item.description: Guti y Valdano analizan a profundidad las carencias que demostró España en su empate 0-0 con Cabo Verde, encendiendo alarmas a tiempo. Mientras tanto, Julio Dely Valdés nos habla del empate de Uruguay con Arabia Saudita y las dudas que provocaron.

media:content.media:title: ¿Por qué España y Uruguay no pudieron ganar en su debut mundialista?
media:content.media:description: Guti y Valdano analizan a profundidad las carencias que demostró España en su empate 0-0 con Cabo Verde, encendiendo alarmas a tiempo. Mientras tanto, Julio Dely Valdés nos habla del empate de Uruguay con Arabia Saudita y las dudas que provocaron.

item.title: ¿Por qué España y Uruguay no pudieron ganar en su debut mundialista?

item.description: En un electrizante partido de alta intensidad, Irán y Nueva Zelanda empataron 2-2 en el Grupo G. Elijah Just fue la gran figura con un doblete para los neozelandeses, pero los iraníes respondieron para sumar un valioso punto.

media:content.media:title: Irán y Nueva Zelanda protagonizan un partidazo con cuatro goles
media:content.media:description: En un electrizante partido de alta intensidad, Irán y Nueva Zelanda empataron 2-2 en el Grupo G. Elijah Just fue la gran figura con un doblete para los neozelandeses, pero los iraníes respondieron para sumar un valioso punto.

item.title: Irán y Nueva Zelanda protagonizan un partidazo con cuatro goles

item.description: Uruguay debutó en el Mundial con un empate 1-1 ante Arabia Saudita en Miami. La Celeste reaccionó en el tramo final tras ir abajo en el marcador y estuvo cerca del triunfo, pero el arquero saudí evitó el gol de Federico Valverde.

media:content.media:title: Todo el Mundial | Uruguay reaccionó al final y rescató un empate en Miami
media:content.media:description: Uruguay debutó en el Mundial con un empate 1-1 ante Arabia Saudita en Miami. La Celeste reaccionó en el tramo final tras ir abajo en el marcador y estuvo cerca del triunfo, pero el arquero saudí evitó el gol de Federico Valverde.

item.title: Todo el Mundial | Uruguay reaccionó al final y rescató un empate en Miami

item.description: España empató 0-0 ante Cabo Verde, que sumó un punto histórico en su estreno en una Copa del Mundo. Vuzinha fue la figura del partido con atajadas decisivas. Yamal, Williams y Olmo ingresaron en el complemento, pero no pudieron cambiar la historia.

media:content.media:title: Todo el Mundial | España no pudo con Cabo Verde en su debut mundialista
media:content.media:description: España empató 0-0 ante Cabo Verde, que sumó un punto histórico en su estreno en una Copa del Mundo. Vuzinha fue la figura del partido con atajadas decisivas. Yamal, Williams y Olmo ingresaron en el complemento, pero no pudieron cambiar la historia.

item.title: Todo el Mundial | España no pudo con Cabo Verde en su debut mundialista

item.description: El director técnico de la Selección de Argentina asegura que dejarán todo en el cancha y que es muy complicado ganar una Copa Mundial.

media:content.media:title: Lionel Scaloni: “Este equipo no ha perdido el hambre de ganar”
media:content.media:description: El director técnico de la Selección de Argentina asegura que dejarán todo en el cancha y que es muy complicado ganar una Copa Mundial.

item.title: Lionel Scaloni: “Este equipo no ha perdido el hambre de ganar”

item.description: Miles de argentinos se reunieron en Kansas City para arrancar la fiesta mundialista, rumbo al debut ante Argelia de este martes. Con las imágenes de Leo Messi y Maradona en lo alto, la hinchada “Albiceleste” coloreó toda la ciudad.

media:content.media:title: Kansas City es Albiceleste! Impresionante banderazo de Argentina previo al debut de la selección
media:content.media:description: Miles de argentinos se reunieron en Kansas City para arrancar la fiesta mundialista, rumbo al debut ante Argelia de este martes. Con las imágenes de Leo Messi y Maradona en lo alto, la hinchada “Albiceleste” coloreó toda la ciudad.

item.title: Kansas City es Albiceleste! Impresionante banderazo de Argentina previo al debut de la selección

item.dc:creator: Jean-Nicholas Fievet
item.description: Reports that a Russian warship fired warning shots at a British yacht were being investigated Tuesday by the U.K.’s defense ministry.

media:content.media:text: The ministry of defense sign on the side of a building
media:content.media:description: The Ministry of Defense building in London.

item.title: U.K. investigating reports Russian ship fired warning shots near a yacht in the English Channel

item.dc:creator: Steve Kopack
Kayla Steinberg
item.description: SpaceX shares continue to soar, gaining another 10% early in the day as buyer interest in Elon Musk’s largest company showed no sign of slowing down.

media:content.media:text: SpaceX facilities.
media:content.media:description: SpaceX’s value now makes it the world’s fourth-largest publicly traded company, leapfrogging both Amazon and Microsoft.

item.title: SpaceX tops Amazon in market value as retail investors race to buy shares

item.dc:creator: Elizabeth Chuck
item.description: Tiffany Score and Steven Mills, who are embroiled in an embryo mix-up at an IVF clinic, will keep their infant after reaching a custody agreement with the baby’s biological parents.

media:content.media:credit: Courtesy of family attorney via WESH
media:content.media:text: A group photo of Tiffany Score, Steven Mills, and their baby.
media:content.media:description: Tiffany Score, Steven Mills, and their baby, Shea.

item.title: Florida couple in IVF clinic’s embryo mix-up will keep baby who is not genetically theirs

item.description: President Donald Trump’s influence on Republican voters will be tested again as several key states hold their primaries, including Georgia, a key race in the balance of the Senate. NBC’s Ryan Nobles reports for TODAY.

media:content.media:title: Key Primary Races to Watch: Alabama, Georgia, More
media:content.media:description: President Donald Trump’s influence on Republican voters will be tested again as several key states hold their primaries, including Georgia, a key race in the balance of the Senate. NBC’s Ryan Nobles reports for TODAY.

item.title: Key Primary Races to Watch: Alabama, Georgia, More

item.description: A new Consumer Reports investigation finds Uber and Lyft customers are often given different fares when they book the same rides at the same time. While Uber and Lyft have long used surge pricing, the new findings are raising questions about whether the apps are using personalized or surveillance pricing based on customers’ personal data. NBC’s Vicky Nguyen reports for TODAY.

media:content.media:title: New Study Sparks Questions Over Uber and Lyft's Ride Pricing
media:content.media:description: A new Consumer Reports investigation finds Uber and Lyft customers are often given different fares when they book the same rides at the same time. While Uber and Lyft have long used surge pricing, the new findings are raising questions about whether the apps are using personalized or surveillance pricing based on customers’ personal data. NBC’s Vicky Nguyen reports for TODAY.

item.title: New Study Sparks Questions Over Uber and Lyft's Ride Pricing

item.description: NBC News chief data analyst Steve Kornacki breaks down real-time vote tallies from Alabama, California, D.C., Georgia and Oklahoma, while giving viewers a behind-the-scenes look at election night coverage.

media:content.media:title: Kornacki Cam: Watch Steve analyze midterm primary election results
media:content.media:description: NBC News chief data analyst Steve Kornacki breaks down real-time vote tallies from Alabama, California, D.C., Georgia and Oklahoma, while giving viewers a behind-the-scenes look at election night coverage.

item.title: Kornacki Cam: Watch Steve analyze midterm primary election results

item.dc:creator: Matt Lavietes
item.description: Video captured the moments after Los Angeles police fatally shot a dog that was wearing a New York Knicks jersey as officers were responding to calls of a screaming woman — screaming which turned out to be a celebration of the Knicks winning the NBA championship.

media:content.media:text: A woman kneels next to her dog after it was shot by a Los Angeles Police Dept. officer on June 13, 2026.
media:content.media:description: A woman holds a dog after it was shot by a Los Angeles Police Dept. officer on Saturday.

media:content.media:text: Jameson, a dog, wearing a New York Knicks shirt.
media:content.media:description: A woman holds a dog after it was shot by a Los Angeles Police Dept. officer on Saturday.

item.title: LAPD kills dog in Knicks shirt while responding to call on screaming woman — who was celebrating Knicks win

item.dc:creator: Daniella Silva
item.description: The protesters face charges that include conspiracy to impede or injure federal officers, assault on a federal officer and destruction of government property, federal officials said.

media:content.media:text: Federal agents with Homeland Security Investigations.
media:content.media:description: Aggressive immigration raids in Minneapolis continued in February, after federal agents killed Renee Good and Alex Pretti.

media:content.media:text: Posters of Alex Pretti and Renee Good, saying they were murdered by ICE, are seen pasted to the wall of a building outside
media:content.media:description: Aggressive immigration raids in Minneapolis continued in February, after federal agents killed Renee Good and Alex Pretti.

media:content.media:text: Federal agents detain a protester near the Bishop Henry Whipple Federal Building in Minneapolis, Minnesota, on January 9, 2026.
media:content.media:description: Aggressive immigration raids in Minneapolis continued in February, after federal agents killed Renee Good and Alex Pretti.

item.title: DOJ charges 15 people it says impeded agents during Minnesota immigration crackdown

item.dc:creator: Megan Lebowitz
Monica Alba
item.description: The Trump administration has spent millions renovating the Reflecting Pool on the National Mall to make it “American flag blue” in time for the nation’s 250th anniversary celebrations

media:content.media:text: Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool.
media:content.media:description: The Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool appears green due to algae growth on June 15.

media:content.media:text: Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool.
media:content.media:description: The Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool appears green due to algae growth on June 15.

media:content.media:text: Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool.
media:content.media:description: The Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool appears green due to algae growth on June 15.

item.title: Trump wanted the Reflecting Pool to be ‘American flag blue.’ Algae is turning it green.

item.dc:creator: NBC News
item.description: It’s looking like this will be a big summer for Hollywood.

media:content.media:text: Chloe Melas
media:content.media:description: Chloe Melas.

item.title: Send your questions for Chloe Melas about summer movies and more
